# 02.03-upgrade-onlym-core: Retarget OnlyM.Core and resolve incompatible package/API issues

# 02.03-upgrade-onlym-core: Upgrade OnlyM.Core

## Objective
Retarget `OnlyM.Core` to `net10.0-windows` and resolve identified package/API compatibility issues for this core library.

## Scope
- `OnlyM.Core/OnlyM.Core.csproj`
- Related code files in `OnlyM.Core/` as needed for compile compatibility

## Done when
- Project targets `net10.0-windows`
- Incompatible package findings are addressed
- Project builds successfully
